obrasgov 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • End-to-end workflow
    • Pagination and nested data
  • News

Package index

Queries

Resources from the ObrasGov Open Data API.

get_projects() obter_projetos()
Retrieve infrastructure projects
get_physical_execution() obter_execucao_fisica()
Retrieve physical execution data
get_contracts() obter_contratos()
Retrieve contracts
get_commitments() obter_empenhos()
Retrieve budget commitments
get_geometries() obter_geometrias()
Retrieve geometries
get_status_history() obter_historico_situacao()
Retrieve project status histories
get_feasibility_studies() obter_estudos_viabilidade()
Retrieve feasibility studies
get_last_update() obter_data_atualizacao()
Retrieve the data update timestamp

Discovery and metadata

list_resources() obrasgov_recursos()
List available ObrasGov API resources
list_filters() obrasgov_filtros()
List filters accepted by a resource
result_metadata() obrasgov_metadados()
Retrieve pagination metadata

Portuguese aliases

Compatibility aliases with Portuguese names and pagination arguments.

get_projects() obter_projetos()
Retrieve infrastructure projects
get_physical_execution() obter_execucao_fisica()
Retrieve physical execution data
get_contracts() obter_contratos()
Retrieve contracts
get_commitments() obter_empenhos()
Retrieve budget commitments
get_geometries() obter_geometrias()
Retrieve geometries
get_status_history() obter_historico_situacao()
Retrieve project status histories
get_feasibility_studies() obter_estudos_viabilidade()
Retrieve feasibility studies
get_last_update() obter_data_atualizacao()
Retrieve the data update timestamp
list_resources() obrasgov_recursos()
List available ObrasGov API resources
list_filters() obrasgov_filtros()
List filters accepted by a resource
result_metadata() obrasgov_metadados()
Retrieve pagination metadata
